title: Aqua Breeze Ceramic Tile
description: Cool aqua-toned ceramic tile with a smooth satin surface. Creates a peaceful and refreshing atmosphere, perfect for modern bathrooms. Moisture-resistant and easy to maintain.

title: Carrara Luxe Marble Tile
description: Elegant white marble tile featuring subtle gray veining. Ideal for premium interiors and luxury flooring. Polished finish enhances brightness and sophistication.

title: Obsidian Black Granite Tile
description: Deep black granite tile with a glossy polished surface. Extremely durable and scratch-resistant, ideal for kitchens and high-traffic areas.

title: Natural Walnut Wood Tile
description: Wood-look porcelain tile with rich walnut textures. Combines the warmth of wood with the durability of tile. Perfect for living rooms and corridors.

title: Ivory Shine Ceramic Tile
description: Glossy ivory ceramic tile that reflects light beautifully. Makes small spaces appear larger and brighter. Ideal for contemporary interiors.

title: Slate Matte Gray Tile
description: Minimalist gray tile with a soft matte finish. Designed for slip resistance, making it perfect for kitchens and bathrooms.

title: Vivid Glass Mosaic Tile
description: Colorful glass mosaic tile that adds a vibrant artistic touch. Perfect for kitchen backsplashes and decorative walls.

title: Terracotta Rustic Tile
description: Earth-toned rustic tile inspired by traditional clay finishes. Ideal for patios and outdoor settings. Durable and weather-resistant.

title: Desert Beige Sandstone Tile
description: Warm beige sandstone tile with natural texture. Blends seamlessly with neutral decor and works for both indoor and outdoor spaces.

title: Pathway Stone Texture Tile
description: Stone-inspired textured tile designed for outdoor landscaping. Provides strong grip and durability in all weather conditions.
